title: Samsung R&D India Ventures Solutions is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Samsung R&D India Ventures Solutions is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Full Stack Developer looking for your next big career move? Samsung R&D India Ventures Solutions in Delhi offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Samsung R&D India Ventures Solutions:
Samsung R&D India Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in AWS

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Flexible working hours
• Annual performance appraisal
• Learning & development budget
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Delhi, Delhi, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Samsung R&D India Ventures Solutions!
